title: cerastium arvense var. glaberrimum
intro: Cerastium arvense var. glaberrimum, also known as Downy Chickweed, is a subspecies of the Cerastium arvense plant, which belongs to the Caryophyllaceae family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Cerastium arvense var. glaberrimum include soothing skin irritations, reducing fever, and alleviating respiratory issues such as colds and coughs. Herbal preparations of this plant include infusions, decoctions, and salves, which can be used to treat various health conditions, including skin problems and respiratory issues.
